traits.name: Whispered Sigils
traits.desc: Trace silent sigils that steady your focus.

traits.name: Veil Sense
traits.desc: You notice the edges of unseen things.

traits.name: Hex Channel
traits.desc: You can hold a spell longer than most.

traits.name: Night Tongue
traits.desc: Old dialects lend weight to your words.

traits.name: Shadow Step
traits.desc: You move with a practiced hush.

traits.name: Eldritch Accuracy
traits.desc: You line up power with greater precision.

traits.name: Sigil Mastery
traits.desc: Complex glyphs obey you more easily.

traits.name: Void Pact
traits.desc: A hard bargain fortifies your will.
